items.title: Home Depot Targets Skilled Labor Gap To Support Long Term Pro Demand
items.description: Home Depot Foundation expanded its Path to Pro Education Grant program to schools and training organizations across the United States. The program includes US$1 million in funding for upgrades to skilled trades training facilities. The initiative targets the skilled labor shortage in the construction industry as a large share of the current workforce approaches retirement. For investors watching Home Depot (NYSE:HD), this move sits at the intersection of its core business in home...

items.title: Housing Will Be An Albatross On The U.S. Economy Throughout 2026
items.description: Housing is dragging on the U.S. economy in 2026, as sales slump and affordability stays weak despite lower mortgage rates. Read what investors need to know.
